global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Browser-based AI agent for automated Kali penetration testing, allowing autonomous execution of security assessments directly in the browser.
Decentralized package layer for AI-native agents (npm equivalent for agents); repos become verifiable packages that agents can inspect, install, and use with source proof.

notes: No qualifying high-signal technical updates (new repos, frameworks, benchmarks, or architecture innovations) from the 10 seed experts in the past 24 hours. Global search surfaced two relevant open-source/agent framework releases; all other results were unrelated, crypto-focused, or non-technical.
